get.description: Retrieve a list of price books available in your HubSpot account. This endpoint supports pagination and can return archived price books if specified. It is useful for accessing and managing pricing information across different products and services.

parameters.name: after
parameters.description: The paging cursor token of the last successfully read resource will be returned as the `paging.next.after` JSON property of a paged response containing more results.

parameters.name: archived
parameters.description: Whether to return only results that have been archived.

parameters.name: limit
parameters.description: The maximum number of results to display per page.

post.description: Create a new price book in your HubSpot account. This endpoint allows you to define custom properties, a name, and supported currencies for the price book. A successful request will return the URL of the newly created resource.

Location.description: URL of the newly created resource

get.description: Retrieve a specific price book by its unique identifier in your HubSpot account. This endpoint allows you to access detailed information about a price book, including its status and supported currencies. It can be useful for managing and reviewing pricing strategies within your commerce system.

parameters.name: priceBookId
parameters.description: The unique identifier of the price book to retrieve.

parameters.name: archived
parameters.description: Whether to return only results that have been archived.

delete.description: Delete a specific price book from your HubSpot account using its unique identifier. This operation will permanently remove the price book and its associated data, making it unavailable for future use.

parameters.name: priceBookId
parameters.description: The unique identifier of the price book to delete.

patch.description: Update an existing price book in your HubSpot account. This operation allows you to modify details such as the name, description, supported currencies, and custom properties of a price book. It is useful for keeping your price book information up to date with the latest changes.

parameters.name: priceBookId
parameters.description: The unique identifier of the price book to update.

post.description: Activate a specific price book in your HubSpot account. This operation changes the status of the price book to active, allowing it to be used in transactions and other operations. Ensure that the price book ID is correct before activation.

parameters.name: priceBookId
parameters.description: The unique identifier of the price book to activate.

post.description: Deactivate a specific price book in your HubSpot account. This action changes the status of the price book to inactive, making it unavailable for use in transactions. Use this endpoint when you need to temporarily or permanently disable a price book without deleting it.

parameters.name: priceBookId
parameters.description: The unique identifier of the price book to deactivate.

get.description: Retrieve a list of items associated with a specific price book in your HubSpot account. This endpoint is useful for accessing detailed information about the products included in a particular price book. It supports pagination to manage large sets of data.

parameters.name: priceBookId
parameters.description: The unique identifier of the price book whose items you want to retrieve.

parameters.name: after
parameters.description: The paging cursor token of the last successfully read resource will be returned as the `paging.next.after` JSON property of a paged response containing more results.

parameters.name: limit
parameters.description: The maximum number of results to display per page.

post.description: Add new items to a specified price book in your HubSpot account. This endpoint allows you to associate products with a price book by providing the necessary product details. It is useful for managing and updating the contents of your price books efficiently.

parameters.name: priceBookId
parameters.description: The unique identifier of the price book to which items will be added.

Location.description: URL of the newly created resource

post.description: Archive multiple items within a specified price book in a single batch operation. This endpoint is useful for managing large sets of price book items that need to be archived simultaneously, streamlining the process and reducing the number of individual requests.

parameters.name: priceBookId
parameters.description: The unique identifier of the price book containing the items to be archived.

post.description: Create multiple items in a specified price book in a single batch operation. This endpoint is useful for efficiently adding a large number of items to a price book, reducing the need for multiple individual requests. The operation returns a batch response indicating the success or failure of each item creation.

parameters.name: priceBookId
parameters.description: The unique identifier of the price book to which the items will be added.

post.description: Update multiple items in a specified price book in a single batch operation. This endpoint allows for efficient updates of price book items, making it useful for managing large sets of data within a price book. The operation returns a batch response indicating the success or failure of each item update.

parameters.name: priceBookId
parameters.description: The unique identifier of the price book containing the items to update.

get.description: Retrieve a specific item from a price book in your HubSpot account. This endpoint allows you to access details of a price book item by specifying the price book and item IDs. It is useful for obtaining information about a particular product's pricing and other related details within a price book.

parameters.name: priceBookId
parameters.description: The unique identifier of the price book containing the item.

parameters.name: priceBookItemId
parameters.description: The unique identifier of the item within the price book to retrieve.

parameters.name: archived
parameters.description: Whether to return only results that have been archived. Accepts a boolean value.

delete.description: Remove a specific item from a price book in your HubSpot account. This operation is irreversible and will permanently delete the item identified by the given priceBookItemId from the price book specified by priceBookId.

parameters.name: priceBookId
parameters.description: The unique identifier of the price book from which the item will be deleted.

parameters.name: priceBookItemId
parameters.description: The unique identifier of the item to be deleted from the price book.

patch.description: Update a specific item within a price book in your HubSpot account. This operation allows you to modify details such as pricing, billing frequency, and custom properties for the specified item. Ensure that the item is identified correctly by its unique priceBookId and priceBookItemId.

parameters.name: priceBookId
parameters.description: The unique identifier of the price book containing the item to update.

parameters.name: priceBookItemId
parameters.description: The unique identifier of the item within the price book to update.

parameters.name: archived
parameters.description: Whether to return only results that have been archived.

post.description: Validate a specific price book in your HubSpot account. This endpoint checks the integrity and correctness of the price book identified by the given priceBookId. Use this to ensure that the price book meets all necessary criteria before proceeding with further operations.

parameters.name: priceBookId
parameters.description: The unique identifier of the price book to validate.

inputs.description: An array of PriceBookAddProductRequest objects, each representing a product to be added to the price book. This property is required.
An array of objects, each representing a price book item to be updated. Each object must conform to the PriceBookItemBatchUpdateInput schema.
An array of SimplePublicObjectId objects, each representing a unique identifier for a public object. This property is required and is used to specify the objects involved in the batch operation.

completedAt.description: The date and time when the batch operation was completed, in ISO 8601 format.

links.description: A map of link names to associated URIs providing additional information or actions related to the batch operation.

requestedAt.description: The date and time when the batch operation was requested, in ISO 8601 format.

results.description: An array of PriceBookItemResponse objects representing the individual results of the batch operation.

startedAt.description: The date and time when the batch operation started, in ISO 8601 format.

status.description: The current status of the batch operation. Valid values include 'PENDING', 'PROCESSING', 'CANCELED', and 'COMPLETE'.

completedAt.description: The date and time when the batch operation was completed, in ISO 8601 format.

errors.description: An array of errors encountered during the batch operation, each represented as a StandardError object.

links.description: A map of link names to associated URIs, providing additional context or actions related to the batch operation.

numErrors.description: The number of errors encountered during the batch operation.

requestedAt.description: The date and time when the batch operation was requested, in ISO 8601 format.

results.description: An array of results from the batch operation, each represented as a PriceBookItemResponse object.

startedAt.description: The date and time when the batch operation started, in ISO 8601 format.

status.description: The current status of the batch operation. Valid values include 'PENDING', 'PROCESSING', 'CANCELED', and 'COMPLETE'.

results.description: An array of price book items, each represented by a PriceBookItemResponse object.
An array of price book objects, each represented by the PriceBookResponse schema.

category.description: The error category, represented as a string.

context.description: An object providing context about the error condition. It contains additional properties, each being an array of strings.

correlationId.description: A unique identifier for the request, represented as a UUID string. Include this value with any error reports or support tickets.

errors.description: An array providing further information about the error, with each item being an ErrorDetail object.

links.description: An object that maps link names to associated URIs containing documentation about the error or recommended remediation steps. Each property is a string.

message.description: A human readable message describing the error along with remediation steps where appropriate. It is a string.

subCategory.description: A specific category that contains more specific detail about the error, represented as a string.

example.message: Invalid input (details will vary based on the error)

code.description: The status code associated with the error detail.

context.description: Context about the error condition, which may include additional information such as missing scopes or invalid property names.

in.description: The name of the field or parameter in which the error was found.

message.description: A human readable message describing the error along with remediation steps where appropriate. This is a required property.

subCategory.description: A specific category that contains more specific detail about the error.

after.description: A string token used as a cursor for pagination to retrieve the next set of results.

link.description: A string URL that provides a direct link to the next page of results.

NextPage.description: Specifies the paging information needed to retrieve the next set of results in a paginated API response

productId.description: The unique identifier of the product to be added to the price book. It is a string and is required.

customProperties.description: An object containing custom properties for the price book. Each property is a key-value pair where the key is a string and the value is also a string. This is a required property.

description.description: A description of the price book. This is an optional string property.

name.description: The name of the price book. It is a required string property.

supportedCurrencies.description: An array of strings representing the currencies supported by the price book. This is a required property.

id.description: The unique identifier for the price book item to be updated. It is a string.

archived.description: Indicates whether the price book item is archived. A boolean value.

archivedAt.description: The date and time when the price book item was archived.

billingFrequency.description: The frequency at which billing occurs for this item. Valid values include 'annually', 'biweekly', 'monthly', 'one_time', 'per_five_years', 'per_four_years', 'per_six_months', 'per_three_years', 'per_two_years', 'quarterly', and 'weekly'.

billingPeriod.description: The billing period for the price book item.

createdAt.description: The date and time when the price book item was created.

customProperties.description: A map of custom property names to their values, allowing for additional customization of the price book item.

id.description: The unique identifier for the price book item.

name.description: The name of the price book item.

priceBookId.description: The unique identifier of the price book to which this item belongs.

productId.description: The unique identifier of the product associated with this price book item.

sku.description: The stock keeping unit (SKU) associated with the price book item.

status.description: The current status of the price book item. Valid values include 'active' and 'inactive'.

updatedAt.description: The date and time when the price book item was last updated.

archived.description: A boolean indicating whether the price book item is archived.

billingFrequency.description: An object specifying the frequency at which billing occurs for the price book item.

billingPeriod.description: An object specifying the period over which billing occurs for the price book item.

customProperties.description: A map of custom property names to their values, allowing for additional customization of the price book item.

status.description: An object indicating the current status of the price book item.

archived.description: A boolean indicating whether this price book is archived.

archivedAt.description: The date and time when this price book was archived.

countOfIncludedProducts.description: The number of products included in this price book.

createdAt.description: The date and time when this price book was created.

customProperties.description: A map of custom property names to their values for this price book.

description.description: A description of the price book.

id.description: The unique identifier for this price book.

name.description: The name of the price book.

status.description: The current status of the price book. Valid values include 'ACTIVE' and 'INACTIVE'.

supportedCurrencies.description: An array of currency codes that this price book supports.

updatedAt.description: The date and time when this price book was last updated.

customProperties.description: An object containing custom properties for the price book, where each key is a property name and the value is a string.

description.description: An object representing the description of the price book to be updated.

name.description: An object representing the name of the price book to be updated.

supportedCurrencies.description: An array of strings representing the currencies supported by the price book.

errors.description: An array of ErrorDetail objects providing information about any errors encountered during validation.

isValid.description: A boolean indicating whether the price book is valid.

amount.description: A number representing the total amount for the pricing entry.

currencyCode.description: A string representing the currency in which the price is denominated.

maxQuantity.description: A string specifying the maximum quantity for which this pricing entry is applicable.

price.description: A number indicating the price of the product or service.

amount.description: An object representing the amount for the price update.

currencyCode.description: The currency code for the price, represented as a string.

maxQuantity.description: The maximum quantity applicable for this price, represented as a string.

prices.description: An array of price entries, each detailing the amount and currency for a specific pricing tier.

pricingModel.description: The type of pricing model applied, which can be one of the following: 'FLAT', 'GRADUATED', 'STAIRSTEP', or 'VOLUME'.

prices.description: An array of PriceUpdateEntry objects, each representing the pricing details for a product, including the currency code and amount.

id.description: The unique identifier for this object, represented as a string.

SimplePublicObjectId.description: Contains the Id of a Public Object

category.description: A string specifying the category of the error.

context.description: An object containing additional context about the error, with each key mapping to an array of strings.

errors.description: An array of ErrorDetail objects providing further information about the error.

id.description: A string representing the unique identifier of the error.

links.description: An object mapping link names to URIs that provide documentation or remediation steps related to the error.

message.description: A string containing a human-readable message that describes the error.

status.description: A string indicating the status of the error.

subCategory.description: An object providing more specific details about the error category.
